Purpose
This internal governance pack sets out MiCasa Real Estate policies for commission, clawbacks, conduct, and conflict of interest declarations for agents and brokers.

1. Commission Policy
MiCasa pays commission to agents based on executed transactions and verified receipts of commission from clients. Commission eligibility requires:
(a) A signed brokerage authorization or representation agreement.
(b) Documented role in the transaction recorded in the CRM.
(c) Compliance with AML/KYC and regulatory requirements.
Payment schedules are subject to finance approval and may be adjusted for applicable deductions or VAT requirements.

2. Clawback Policy
MiCasa reserves the right to claw back commissions where:
(a) A transaction is canceled or reversed after payment.
(b) Commission was paid based on inaccurate or incomplete information.
(c) Regulatory non-compliance or misconduct is confirmed.
The agent will be notified in writing and provided a summary of the basis for any clawback.

3. Code of Conduct
Agents shall:
(a) Act honestly and in the best interests of clients.
(b) Comply with Abu Dhabi DMT/ADM regulations and UAE law.
(c) Avoid misrepresentation and disclose material facts.
(d) Maintain client confidentiality and data privacy.
(e) Avoid conflicts of interest and disclose them immediately.
(f) Use company systems and branding in accordance with policies.

4. Conflict of Interest Declaration
The Agent declares the following:
(a) I have disclosed any personal or financial interest in properties, clients, or counterparties related to my work.
(b) I will notify MiCasa immediately of any potential conflicts that arise.
(c) I understand that undisclosed conflicts may lead to disciplinary action.

Declared Conflicts (if any):
__________________________________________________________________
__________________________________________________________________

5. Acknowledgment
I acknowledge that I have read, understood, and will comply with this Governance Pack. I understand that failure to comply may result in disciplinary action or termination.

6. Governing Law
This governance pack is maintained in accordance with the laws of the United Arab Emirates and applicable regulations in the Emirate of Abu Dhabi.
